text.title: instagram-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for instagram-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Instagram suppresses reach for Reels that contain the TikTok watermark. Cross-posted content must have the watermark stripped and ideally be re-edited for Instagram's format.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated captions with heavy exclamation marks and emojis.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs default to enthusiastic, emoji-heavy Instagram captions. This reads as inauthentic and degrades brand credibility. Explicitly prohibit exclamation marks and emojis (or set a strict per-post limit) in every prompt.

failure-mode.description: Agent picks trending hashtags from training data.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hashtag trends change weekly. Training-data hashtag suggestions are stale. Fetch current top hashtags via a research subagent or manual lookup before generating content.

failure-mode.description: All Reel scripts follow listicle structure ("3 tips for X").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs default to listicle format. Overuse of listicles reduces content variety and engagement. Force narrative or transformation arcs periodically to avoid audience fatigue.

failure-mode.description: Agent recommends "trending audio" without an external lookup.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The model cannot know current trending audio on Instagram — it has no real-time data. Require an external lookup before the agent recommends audio choices.
